next_checkpoint_requirement: Push the attested main-branch closure commit, verify origin/main equals local main, and delete only the two verified ancestor remote codex branches. Do not tag, deploy, publish raw sources, release the book, or publish the X article.
non_claims: Changed-path and package counts are engineering-risk indicators, not semantic or empirical proof.
Checkpoint completion does not imply push, deployment, release, or publication beyond the user's explicit 2026-07-16 main-branch instruction.
The symbolic closure_commit value identifies the Git commit containing this record; the attestation binds its required parent to the exact checkpoint commit without inventing a self-hash.
No tag, deploy, raw-source publication, book release, social publication, support, reproduction, transfer, SOTA, AGI, or ASI claim follows.
